_comment: Progressive episode draft schema. Written by podcast-episode-ideas, updated by podcast-episode-outline and podcast-episode-narrative. Optional at every stage — skills fall back to copy-paste input when this file is absent.

meta.last_updated_at: ISO-8601 timestamp updated by each skill
meta.theme: The original theme string entered by the user
meta.theme_slug: Lowercase hyphenated version of theme used in the filename

selected_idea.title: Episode title chosen by the user
selected_idea.listener_takeaway: One to two sentences describing the key spiritual insight or life application

outline.outline_text: Full verbatim outline text as produced in chat by podcast-episode-outline, including all headings and subsections
outline.selected_title: The title the user chose, or null if deferred to the narrative stage

narrative._comment: Fields mirror episode-template.json exactly. The narrative skill extracts these fields and writes them as podcast-episode-temp.json for generate-docx.py.
narrative.title: Final episode title used in the docx
